title: psychotria nigra var. nigra
intro: Psychotria nigra var. nigra, also known as the Black Strap Plant or Black Chastetree, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria nigra var. nigra include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
